meta.title: Terms & Conditions | aws overseas
meta.description: Read the terms and conditions governing the use of aws overseas's website and shipping services.

hero.title: Terms & Conditions
hero.subtitle: Please read these terms carefully before using our website or shipping services.

sections.title: Acceptance of Terms
sections.content: By accessing or using aws overseas's website or services, you agree to comply with these Terms & Conditions.

sections.title: Services
sections.content: aws overseas provides international shipping, freight forwarding, customs clearance, warehousing, and related supply chain services.

sections.title: Customer Responsibilities
sections.content: Customers must provide accurate shipment information, required documentation, and comply with all applicable laws and regulations.

sections.title: Payments
sections.content: All payments must be completed according to the agreed quotation before shipment processing unless otherwise agreed.

sections.title: Prohibited Goods
sections.content: Customers must not ship prohibited, illegal, hazardous, or restricted goods unless permitted under applicable laws and approved by aws overseas.

sections.title: Limitation of Liability
sections.content: aws overseas shall not be liable for delays or losses caused by customs, natural disasters, government actions, or other circumstances beyond our reasonable control.

sections.title: Changes
sections.content: aws overseas reserves the right to update these Terms & Conditions at any time.
